creator: martin@lispworks.com
text:
(In reply to Warner Losh from comment #4)

I've reopened this because the update has missed an important part of my patch:

-						if (!adjbuf((char **) &buf, &bufsz, bp-buf+1, 100, (char **) &bp, "relex2"))
+						if (!adjbuf((char **) &buf, &bufsz, bp-buf+2, 100, (char **) &bp, "relex2"))

This is needed to prevent heap buffer overflow, e.g. for 

awk '/[[:cntrl:]01234567[:graph:]]/'

See also https://github.com/onetrueawk/awk/issues/121

I'll make a new PR if you prefer.
